should_trigger.prompt: Small CSS change — don't overthink it
Quick config fix, no need for a plan
Help me with quick patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Plan a large refactor of the auth system
Investigate the root cause of this complex bug
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Change this one line in the config — super simple
After fixing the bug, also check if quick needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Fix this tricky bug that spans multiple files
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
